def negative_embedding_computed_per_request():
    rule_id = "embedding_computed_per_request"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Embeddings recomputed on request paths instead of cached or precomputed for stable inputs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
